post_study_work_visa.name: Graduate Route Visa
post_study_work_visa.restrictions: No employer sponsorship required. Can work any job. Must switch to Skilled Worker visa for long-term stay.

language_requirement: English (IELTS 7.0+ typically required for non-native speakers)
scholarship_availability: Moderate — Chevening scholarships for international students, school-specific awards. LBS offers significant merit aid.
path_to_pr: Skilled Worker visa → ILR (Indefinite Leave to Remain) after 5 years. Graduate route counts toward settlement timeline.
test_policy: GMAT or GRE accepted. Some programs accept GMAT Focus Edition. LBS requires GMAT/GRE with no waiver option.
